name: Rahul Kumar
review: Alok built our entire e-commerce platform from scratch in MERN. The quality and speed were outstanding — highly recommend!

name: Arjun Singh
review: The smart contract Alok wrote for our voting DApp was clean, secure, and gas-optimized. Exactly what we needed.

name: Priya Mehta
review: Our REST API now handles 10k+ requests daily without breaking a sweat. Professional, communicative, and delivered on time.

name: David Garcia
review: Alok integrated Socket.IO into our SaaS perfectly. Real-time notifications work flawlessly across thousands of users.

name: James Wilson
review: Best blockchain developer I've worked with. He understood our DeFi requirements and delivered a robust, well-tested solution.

name: Neha Kapoor
review: Incredible attention to code quality. Alok refactored our messy legacy API into a clean microservices architecture.

name: Sanjay Mishra
review: Alok's React components are reusable and well-documented. He's the kind of developer who makes the whole team better.

name: Lucas Rodrigues
review: Our NFT marketplace is live and thriving thanks to Alok's ERC-721 implementation and IPFS integration. Brilliant work.

name: Aisha Thompson
review: Delivered a complex real-time chat feature in just 5 days. Alok's approach to Socket.IO architecture was elegant and scalable.

name: Marco Vitale
review: Hired Alok for a 3-month contract, ended up keeping him for 8. He's efficient, proactive, and genuinely cares about the product.

name: Michael T.
review: Alok delivered exceptional work and helped bring our product concept to life. The MERN stack application was flawless — polished UI, fast API, and clean code.

name: Ian Ahmad
review: Highly professional and detail-oriented. Alok built our REST API with proper authentication, rate limiting, and documentation. It handles 10k+ daily requests without issues.
